arts.ttl: Players to wear new back-of-shirt ‘PALACE’ font
arts.sum: Crystal Palace players will wear a new font for the names and numbers on the back of their shirts today, titled ‘PALACE’.

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Romain Esse to Crystal Palace, Woyo Coulibaly to Leicester City and Philip Billing to Napoli.

arts.ttl: Glasner discusses Riad recovery ahead of Stockport cup test
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says defender Chadi Riad is “really progressing” and could potentially be involved in Sunday’s FA Cup third round tie against Stockport County.

arts.ttl: Go inside Palace's pre-FA Cup training
arts.sum: It's FA Cup third-round weekend at last, and as Crystal Palace get set to begin their 2024/25 Cup journey at home to Stockport County on Sunday afternoon, preparations are in full swing in South London.

arts.ttl: 'Our team spirit was unbelievable': Wilbraham on his favourite Palace memories
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday’s meeting between two of his former clubs – Palace and Stockport County – former forward Aaron Wilbraham spoke to the matchday programme, looking back on some of his favourite memories as an Eagle.

arts.ttl: Young striker leaves SK Beveren early to return to Crystal Palace
arts.sum: SK Beveren have announced that on loan Crystal Palace forward Ademola Ola-Adebomi has returned to his parent club. The 21-year-old played nine games for the Belgian second tier side during…

arts.ttl: Asher Agbinone joins Gillingham on loan
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s winger Asher Agbinone has joined Gillingham on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Crystal Palace vs. Stockport County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's FA Cup clash between Crystal Palace and Stockport County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
